burial.plot_notes: Cedar Hill Cemetery Hartford CT. FindAGrave confirms.

parents.father_research_notes: Father Frank Dexter Cheney (1878-1955) of Manchester CT, of the Cheney silk-manufacturing family. Through Frank Dexter she is a great-granddaughter of Horace Bushnell of Hartford (1802-1876, Congregational theologian, 'Christian Nurture' author) — the line runs Hope → Frank Dexter Cheney → Frank Woodbridge Cheney + Mary Bushnell → Horace Bushnell. Per Jalapeño Rule, none of Hope's Cheney/Bushnell ancestors are built into the Hooker tree (Hooker connection enters only via Hope's marriage to Charles Hooker Talcott Jr. TD0063).
parents.mother_research_notes: Mother Sara Otis Amory (1875-1959); married Frank Dexter Cheney 1 June 1904 Chicago. Through her mother Hope belonged to the Amory and Otis families of Boston. Per Jalapeño, not built.

narrative_blocks.body: Hope's paternal line ran back four generations to Horace Bushnell of Hartford (1802-1876) — the Congregational theologian whose 'Christian Nurture' (1847) reshaped American religious liberalism. The line: Hope → her father Frank Dexter Cheney → her grandfather Frank Woodbridge Cheney (Civil War officer, Cheney silk family) and grandmother Mary Bushnell → Horace Bushnell. Through her mother Sara Otis Amory she also belonged to the Amory and Otis families of Boston.

burial.plot_notes: Cedar Hill Cemetery Hartford CT. FindAGrave confirms.

burial.plot_notes: Cedar Hill Cemetery Hartford CT. FindAGrave confirms.

narrative_blocks.header: Second wife married and died in the same
narrative_blocks.body: Charles married Hope Amory Cheney in 1940; she died on December 10 of that same year, aged 27, cause unknown. He married a third time in 1942 and lived until 1989, dying in Greenwich at age 87.

burialCemetery.name: Cedar Hill Cemetery
burialCemetery.notes: Major Hartford garden cemetery. Contains graves of J.P. Morgan Sr., Mark Twain, and many prominent Hartford families.
